ogTitle: Sellicks Beach vs Semaphore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sellicks Beach and Semaphore.
heading: Sellicks Beach vs Semaphore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sellicks Beach, South Australia and Semaphore, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sellicks Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Semaphore (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sellicks Beach or Semaphore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sellicks Beach has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Semaphore scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sellicks Beach scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Semaphore scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sellicks Beach or Semaphore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sellicks Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
